data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for migration tools for field changes, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of these migration tools. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as there is no supporting evidence to validate that this requirement is met.
gaps: Missing evidence for migration tools for field changes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Provide evidence for migration tools
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm the existence and functionality of migration tools for field changes.
